name: 场景情绪 - 苹果产品
description: 克制、清透、产品发布感，适合产品介绍、工具评测与品牌内容

h1.after: display: block; width: 44px; height: 3px; background: #0a84ff; margin: 12px auto 0; border-radius: 999px;

h2.after: display: block; width: 32px; height: 2px; background: #0a84ff; margin-top: 8px; border-radius: 999px;

styles.quote: border-left: 4px solid #0a84ff; border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px 18px; background: #f5f7fb; margin: 1em 0; color: #4b5563;

code.block: color: #1f2937; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(17,24,39,0.05); margin: 1.2em 0; padding: 1em; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; white-space: pre-wrap;

styles.image: max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 1.2em auto; display: block; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(17,24,39,0.08);
styles.link: color: #0a84ff; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(10,132,255,0.35);

table.container: width: 100%; margin: 1em 0; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
table.header: background: #f8fafc; font-weight: bold; color: #111827; border-bottom: 2px solid #e5e7eb;
